project.name: AI Chatbot Backend
project.description: AI Chatbot backend cho seller TMDT Viet Nam. Multi-tenant, RAG-based, NestJS standalone service.

tech_stack.auth: Supabase Auth Native SDK Edge Validation (getUser)
tech_stack.ai_llm: Gemini 2.5 Flash via OpenAI-compatible API (openai npm package)

ai_provider_details.strategy: OpenAI SDK cho LLM chat, Google SDK cho embedding — cùng 1 API key

tech_stack.security: Helmet, CORS, timingSafeEqual (webhook HMAC), AES-256-GCM (token encryption), HMAC-SHA256 (OAuth state), @nestjs/throttler (rate limiting)
tech_stack.payment: SePay VietQR webhook (bank transfer detection), @nestjs/schedule (cron jobs)

channel_connection_fields.refreshTokenEnc: String? — Zalo refresh token, encrypted same as accessTokenEnc
channel_connection_fields.tokenExpiresAt: DateTime? — null for FB (non-expiring), set for Zalo (1h access token)

database_schema.notes: Plan model includes maxTenants (Int, default 1) — per-plan tenant limits: Free=1, Basic=2, Standard=5, Premium=10

auth_flow.jwt_source: Supabase Auth (ECC P-256 via SDK Edge)
auth_flow.auto_register: JWT validate -> find Seller by auth_id -> create if not exist
auth_flow.request_user_shape: { authId: string, email: string, sellerId: string }
guards: TenantGuard (verify TenantMember by sellerId + tenantId + isActive)

api_endpoints.description: Staff sends message directly (no LLM), auto-switches status to OPEN, sends to FB/Zalo
Hand conversation back to bot (OPEN → BOT_HANDLING), SYSTEM audit message
Disconnect Facebook Page (unsubscribe webhook + clear tokens)
Get pending pages for multi-page selection
Select a Facebook Page from pending session
SePay bank transfer webhook (excluded from /api/v1 prefix)

phase_09_facebook_messenger.notes: Refactored to OAuth flow (no manual token). Multi-page selection, token encryption, webhook unsubscribe on disconnect, rate limiting.

zalo_oa_channel.notes: Full Zalo OA integration: OAuth, token refresh (1h TTL), webhook (HMAC), message routing, ZaloAdapter for send/reply.

facebook_oauth_refactor.notes: Replaced manual token input with OAuth flow. HMAC-signed state, multi-page selection, encrypted token storage.

security_enhancements.notes: AES-256-GCM token encryption (crypto.util.ts), HMAC-SHA256 OAuth state, rate limiting (@Throttle 5/min on OAuth endpoints), token revocation on disconnect.

billing_plans_system.notes: 4-tier plans (Free/Basic/Standard/Premium), QuotaService (auto-assign, limit checks, monthly reset cron), branding injection (Free watermark), downgrade LIFO deactivation, expiry cron (6h), REST APIs, FE Usage+Billing UI.

payment_integration.notes: VietQR+SePay: PaymentOrder model, webhook auto-detect, QR code modal, polling, subscription activate, response pack purchase, transaction history, expiry reminder (cron 6h), WebSocket notifications, FE ExpiryWarningBanner.

tenant_quota_enforcement.notes: maxTenants field in Plan model, checkTenantLimit() in QuotaService, tenants usage in getUsageStats(), TenantSwitcher dropdown with quota display + inline create + upgrade CTA.

business_rules: Tao Tenant -> auto-create OWNER TenantMember + default Agent (transaction)
Slug unique, lowercase+numbers+hyphens only
RBAC: OWNER > ADMIN > AGENT
TenantGuard checks isActive on TenantMember
Chat: auto-create Customer if customerId not provided
Chat: history context uses LAST 20 messages
Chat: HUMAN_AGENT messages map to 'assistant' role for LLM context
Platform controls AI model — user only configures name/persona/greeting
Quota: check messageUsed < messageQuota before LLM call, increment after success
Knowledge: max 10MB, .txt/.pdf only, recursive split 1500 chars/200 overlap
RAG: soft-lock prompt — prioritize knowledge but allow general answers
RAG: similarity threshold 0.3, top-K=5, graceful fallback on search failure
Conversation status OPEN = nhân viên đang xử lý, bot không reply
Human agent reply → auto status OPEN + forward to Facebook/Zalo
Handover-to-bot → status BOT_HANDLING + SYSTEM audit message
FB webhook: respond 200 trong 5s, xử lý async
Zalo webhook: HMAC-SHA256 verify (OA Secret Key), respond 200 async
Message dedup: in-memory Map (TTL 5 phút) — cần Redis khi multi-instance
Webhook HMAC: timingSafeEqual (anti timing attack)
FB Graph API: Bearer auth header (không dùng query param)
FB OAuth: HMAC-signed state (tenantId.timestamp.sig16), TTL 10 phút
FB Multi-page: 1 page → auto-connect, N pages → pending session (in-memory, TTL 10 phút) → FE chọn
Token encryption: AES-256-GCM, backward-compatible (plaintext nếu KEY chưa set)
Token revocation: FB disconnect → DELETE /{pageId}/subscribed_apps (non-blocking) + clear tokens
Zalo token refresh: access_token 1h TTL, auto-refresh 5 phút trước khi hết, background job mỗi 15 phút
Rate limiting: OAuth endpoints 5/min, global 10/min + 100/hour
Billing: 4 plans seeded via prisma/seed-plans.ts (idempotent upsert by slug)
Billing: SellerSubscription 1:1 per seller (sellerId @unique) — UPDATE not CREATE on plan change
Billing: Auto-assign Free plan on first getSubscription() for new sellers
Billing: QuotaService enforces AI response limits (check before LLM, increment after success)
Billing: Monthly reset cron (1st of month 00:00) resets aiResponsesUsed to 0
Billing: Branding watermark appended for Free plan via injectBranding() (excluded from testMessage/Playground)
Billing: Downgrade uses LIFO — newest resources deactivated first, OWNER never deactivated
Billing: Knowledge over-limit is soft (log warning only, no deactivation)
Billing: ExpiryCheck cron (every 6h) — expired ACTIVE subscriptions reverted to Free plan
Payment: Only 1 PENDING order per seller at any time (ensureNoPendingOrder)
Payment: orderCode = 6 random digits, transferContent = PREFIX + orderCode
Payment: SePay webhook auth = 'Apikey {key}' header, timing-safe comparison
Payment: Webhook DTO uses @Allow() decorators (bypass Global ValidationPipe whitelist)
Payment: completeOrder() dedup by sepayTransId (Prisma @unique)
Payment: Response Pack purchase → bonusResponsesRemaining += packSize (atomic increment)
Payment: reminderSentAt reset to null on both plan downgrade and subscription renewal
Notification: WebSocket rooms = auth:{supabaseUserId}, Supabase JWT handshake verification
Tenant limit: Plan.maxTenants enforced by QuotaService.checkTenantLimit() before tenant creation
Tenant limit: Usage API includes tenants.used/tenants.limit for FE quota display
Tenant limit: TenantModule imports PlanModule for QuotaService DI
coding_conventions: Import paths use .js extension (ESM compat)
Controller user type: inline { sellerId: string }
Services receive sellerId as first param
Nested resources: /tenants/:tenantId/agents
DTOs use class-validator decorators + @nestjs/swagger ApiProperty
PrismaService is @Global() via CommonModule
LlmService is @Global() via CommonModule > LlmModule
LLM calls must be wrapped in try/catch with Logger
pgvector operations use $queryRawUnsafe with parameterized queries
Fire-and-forget pattern for sendHumanReplyToChannel (.catch log, no await block)
WS events: EventEmitter2 decoupled (Service emits → Gateway broadcasts to Socket.IO rooms)
WS room naming: tenant:{tenantId} (conversations) + auth:{authId} (billing notifications)
API prefix: /api/v1 globally, exclude webhook/* and channels/*/callback
Response format: ResponseInterceptor wraps { success: true, data } globally
Error format: GlobalExceptionFilter → { success: false, error: { statusCode, message, timestamp, path } }
Token encrypt/decrypt: encryptToken()/decryptToken() from src/common/crypto.util.ts — all token read/write must use these
OAuth state: createSignedState()/verifySignedState() from src/common/crypto.util.ts
Pending page sessions: in-memory Map with 10min TTL + 60s cleanup interval
Graceful shutdown: app.enableShutdownHooks() in main.ts
Dockerfile: non-root user (appuser), healthcheck, multi-stage build

env_vars.notes: APP_BASE_URL = ngrok HTTPS URL for dev, production domain for prod. SEPAY vars optional (payment feature disabled without them). NestJS ConfigModule caches .env at bootstrap — full restart required after changes.

known_issues: src/tenant/ and src/agent/ (root level) are empty scaffolding dirs, real code is in src/modules/
Tenant.settings column exists in DB but no DTO exposes it yet
In-memory dedup Map needs Redis when scaling to multiple instances
Socket.IO single-instance only — needs @socket.io/redis-adapter for horizontal scaling
Pending page sessions are in-memory — lost on server restart (acceptable for dev, consider Redis for prod)
Ngrok free tier shows interstitial page on first visit — can delay OAuth callback
